title: Comprehensibility of Fact Sheets Addressing Benefits and Risks of Preventive Interventions: A Cross-Sectional Evaluation Study.
abstract: Preventive tests and procedures (PTPs) help to reduce disease burden. However, patient expectations often differ from current guidelines, resulting in overuse or underuse of PTPs. Shared decision making can bridge this gap but requires clear, evidence-based information. This study aimed to develop and conduct an initial evaluation of prototype fact sheets designed to support informed decisions about PTPs.
